words.hint: Dotknął się po głowie, jakby próbował sobie coś przypomnieć.
words.answer: He touched his head as if trying to remember something.

words.hint: Złapała się za szyję, bo bolało ją gardło.
words.answer: She grabbed her neck because her throat hurt.
He placed his hand on his friend's shoulder.

words.hint: Podniosła rękę, żeby odpowiedzieć na pytanie.
words.answer: She raised her arm to answer the question.

words.hint: Uderzył się w łokieć o stół.
words.answer: He hit his elbow on the table.
She held the child's hand in hers.

words.hint: Złamał palec podczas gry w koszykówkę.
words.answer: He broke his finger while playing basketball.

words.hint: Pokazał kciuk w górę na znak aprobaty.
words.answer: He gave a thumbs up to show approval.

words.hint: Położył się na plecach i patrzył w niebo.
words.answer: He lay on his back and looked at the sky.

words.hint: Poczuła ból w klatce piersiowej i zadzwoniła po pomoc.
words.answer: She felt pain in her chest and called for help.
He touched his belly because he was hungry.
She fastened the belt around her waist.

words.hint: Złapał się za biodro po długim biegu.
words.answer: He grabbed his hip after a long run.

words.hint: Podrapał się po udzie, bo coś go ugryzło.
words.answer: He scratched his thigh because something bit him.
He bent his knee to tie his shoe.

words.hint: Łydka zaczęła mu drżeć ze zmęczenia.
words.answer: His calf started trembling from exhaustion.
She twisted her ankle while dancing.

words.hint: Zdjął buty i poczuł ulgę w stopach.
words.answer: He took off his shoes and felt relief in his feet.

words.hint: Uderzył się w palec u nogi o krzesło.
words.answer: He stubbed his toe on the chair.

words.hint: Pięta bolała go po długim spacerze.
words.answer: His heel hurt after a long walk.
She ran her fingers through her hair.
He furrowed his forehead in surprise.
He raised his eyebrow in disbelief.
He closed his eyes and rested.

words.hint: Powieki zaczęły mu opadać ze zmęczenia.
words.answer: His eyelids began to droop from fatigue.
Her eyelashes were wet from tears.
His nose was red from the cold.

words.hint: Pocałował ją w policzek na pożegnanie.
words.answer: He kissed her on the cheek to say goodbye.
He opened his mouth to say something.
His lips trembled with fear.
He stuck out his tongue playfully.

words.hint: Ząb bolał go przez całą noc.
words.answer: His tooth hurt all night.
He touched his chin and got lost in thought.
His throat hurt after shouting.

words.hint: Serce biło mu szybciej z emocji.
words.answer: His heart was beating faster from excitement.
His lungs filled with fresh air.
His stomach was growling from hunger.

words.hint: Nerki zaczęły go boleć po treningu.
words.answer: His kidneys started hurting after the workout.

words.hint: Wątroba jest ważnym organem w ciele.
words.answer: The liver is an important organ in the body.
Her skin was dry and cracked.
The bone was sticking out after the fracture.
His muscles were sore after exercising.

words.hint: Żyły były widoczne na jego rękach.
words.answer: The veins were visible on his arms.
Blood was flowing from the wound.
The brain processes all information.
She painted her nails red.
His navel was showing under the shirt.
